productionBoundaryProof.proofNote: All benchmark annotations and report code live under src/fixtures/eval and remain covered by the existing evaluation-only import guards.

recommendation.rationale: Some benchmark cases improve with region isolation, but the gains are not uniform enough to treat crop isolation alone as the dominant bottleneck.
